title: Villach、Carinthia — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Villach、Carinthiaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

VillachはCarinthiaにある人口64,071の都市です。A charming city in southern Austria near the Italian border, known for its thermal springs, the Villach Alpine Geothermal Trail, and the stunning Faaker See lake.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
